title: kleinia
intro: Kleinia is a genus of flowering plants in the daisy family, Asteraceae, native to tropical Africa. The medicinal properties of Kleinia plants are primarily attributed to their high concentration of flavonoids, which have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Kleinia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antiseptic and antiviral properties, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. Kleinia is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it can also be used in tincture or capsule form to harness its medicinal properties.
